title: Green River Distillery Full Proof Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey 75cl, 58.7% ABV – Barrel Strength, Mash Bill, Small-Batch Blend of 5–7 Year Barrels – Sip Neat, Over Ice or Classic Cocktails
availability_text: Only 12 left in stock (more on the way).
features: BOLD, LAYERED FLAVOUR: Deep golden-amber bourbon brimming with warming spice, vanilla and caramel, lifted by chocolate-coated peppermint, cinnamon, dried cherry and light leather; rich, lingering mouthfeel and a confident, full-proof finish

BARREL-STRENGTH: Bottled at its natural batch proof (58.65% ABV), non-diluted and blended from select barrels for maximum character. Mash bill: 70% Kentucky-grown corn, 21% rye, 9% malted barley. Kentucky Straight and small batch
HERITAGE, REVIVED: Distilled and aged in Owensboro, Western Kentucky at the historic DSP-KY-10 site founded in 1885—today proudly restored as Green River Distilling Co., “the Pride of Owensboro"

FULL-PROOF PEDIGREE: Launch release blended from five-to-seven-year barrels selected from curated rickhouse locations; initial batch bottled at 117.3 proof (58.65% ABV). Quality you can trust for sipping and gifting

SERVE: Enjoy neat in a Glencairn to savour spice and caramel; add a few drops of water or serve over ice to open aromatics. Its robust structure shines in classic bourbon cocktails such as an Old Fashioned
description: Product Description Green River Full Proof Bourbon is crafted for drinkers who want the barrel’s voice to sing. In the glass, it shows a deep golden-amber hue. The nose leads with warming spice, vanilla and caramel, opening to chocolate-coated peppermint, cinnamon, dried cherry and a whisper of light leather. On the palate it’s generous and textural, delivering layered sweetness and rye-backed spice before settling into a lingering, rich finish that invites a slow second sip. “Full Proof” here means exactly that: a small batch of select barrels blended and bottled at its natural batch strength—117.3 proof (58.65% ABV) for the inaugural release—so none of the flavour is watered down. The mash bill is classic Green River: 70% Kentucky-grown corn, 21% rye and 9% malted barley, balancing a sweet core with a savoury, peppery lift. Behind the flavour is a revived Kentucky landmark. The distillery stands in Owensboro on the historic DSP-KY-10 site founded in 1885, today restored and producing whiskey that honours local grain and time-tested methods. For this expression, Green River blends five- to seven-year barrels from curated areas of its rickhouses to capture both warmth and freshness in the final profile. Serve it your way. Neat in a tulip-shaped whisky glass shows caramel, vanilla and rising spice in full focus. A few drops of water broaden the mid-palate and lift mint-chocolate and citrusy top notes. Prefer a mixed serve? The bourbon’s full-proof structure brings definition to an Old Fashioned, standing up to bitters and orange without losing its depth. Bottled for character rather than conformity, Green River Full Proof comes in a share-ready 75cl format at 58.7% ABV—ideal for thoughtful gifting, slow evening pours and confident, spirit-forward cocktails. Enjoy responsibly. Manufacturer Contact Information Green River Distilling Co, Owensboro, Kentucky, USA

specifications_table.Storage Instructions: ‎Neat or with a few drops of water; over ice; excellent in an Old Fashioned. Glassware: Glencairn/tumbler
specifications_table.Manufacturer contact: ‎Green River Distilling Co, Owensboro, Kentucky, USA
